About Me

Crafting the Future through Technology

I am Mahek Malkan, a Computer Science Engineering student at Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur. I am passionate about web development, machine learning, data science, and digital product creation. I enjoy transforming ideas into meaningful digital solutions that combine functionality, innovation, and user-centered design.

Projects

What I've Built

Real-world projects solving real problems — click to explore each one.

01

Tomato Leaf Disease Detection System

Developed an ML-based system using Python, TensorFlow, Keras, OpenCV, and NumPy to detect diseases in tomato leaves. Implemented image preprocessing and CNN-based classification achieving high accuracy. Evaluated using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 Score, and Confusion Matrix metrics.

Python TensorFlow Keras OpenCV NumPy CNN Deep Learning
AI · Agriculture · ML
02

Smart Parking Slot Booking System

Built a parking slot booking platform with authentication, booking management, real-time parking availability tracking, and add-on services. Features a smooth user experience with smart city dashboard design and Firebase real-time database integration.

HTML CSS JavaScript Python MySQL Firebase
Smart City · Dashboard
03

Startup Discovery Platform

Developed a responsive startup discovery platform with Firebase Authentication and Firestore. Features advanced filtering by category/stage, user bookmarking, personalized dashboards, and comprehensive startup profile management for entrepreneurs and investors.

HTML CSS JavaScript Firebase Auth Firestore Responsive
SaaS · Analytics · Web App
